evals.prompt: Review APP-017 for functional completeness against PRD/TECH/TEST. Write any durable findings into REVIEW.md, but do not fix them yet.
evals.expected_output: Uses the functional review reference, inspects the spec and implementation surfaces, reports findings first, and creates or updates REVIEW.md entries with evidence and acceptance criteria.

evals.prompt: Do a non-functional architecture and maintainability review for APP-017. Focus on duplicated catalogs, module boundaries, code size, and testability.
evals.expected_output: Uses the quality review reference, avoids product-scope findings, records concrete maintainability issues in REVIEW.md with severity, evidence, required fix, and verification plan.

evals.prompt: Review whether APP-017 is ready to ship. Check functionality and code quality, then summarize remaining risks.
evals.expected_output: Loads both references, separates functional from quality findings, updates REVIEW.md only for durable issues, and reports verification commands and residual gaps.
